title: UnDercontrol Expense Resource
description: Schema for expense YAML resource files. Expenses track individual spending transactions, optionally linked to a budget and account.

budget_id.description: Budget UUID or prefix this expense belongs to.

account_id.description: Account UUID or prefix the expense was paid from.

occurred_at.description: When the expense occurred. Accepts YYYY-MM-DD or ISO 8601.

example.description:
Example expense YAML:

apiVersion: ud/v1
kind: Expense
metadata:
  tags: [food, lunch]
spec:
  title: Team lunch
  amount:
    amount: 85.50
    currency: USD
  budget_id: abc123
  account_id: def456
  occurred_at: 2025-03-15
